headline: Why Choose Opus Builders for Residential General Contracting in Altadena
articleBody:
Altadena has many options for Residential General Contracting, so what sets Opus Builders apart? Here is why clients consistently choose us:

What Makes Us Different
• Fully licensed, bonded, and insured with verifiable credentials
• Portfolio of completed projects with references you can contact
• Detailed written estimates with transparent pricing and no hidden fees
• Comprehensive warranty on all workmanship and materials

Understanding Costs
• Get at least 3 written estimates to understand the fair market range for your project
• The lowest bid is rarely the best value — compare scope, materials, and warranty terms
• A typical payment schedule is 10-15% deposit, progress payments tied to milestones, and final payment at completion

Opus Builders is a Los Angeles, California construction company offering residential and commercial design-build services, including custom luxury home construction, high-end renovations, and modern minimalist architectural design. Services include in-house design, project planning, and full construction management, providing end-to-end solutions for clients seeking high-quality, turnkey building projects.

Call Opus Builders at (818) 939-8855 to experience the difference.
